description: Backend follow-ups from COMP-MOBILE-1: (1) COMP-HEALTH gate downgrade now re-persists active-build.json (identity-guarded by flowId/featureCode against last-writer-wins clobber) so the watcher re-broadcasts buildState with the real failed outcome; healthDowngradeReason threads into the history record's failureReason. (2) build-history.jsonl records gain compact per-step results (projectHistorySteps; shared stepOutcomeToStatus dedupes syncStepHistory's mapping; summary kept only for failed steps); mobile BuildHistoryList renders steps in expanded rows; useBuildHistory tracks rebroadcast status changes so the corrective post-checks alert no longer false-fires.
phase: COMP-COCKPIT Wave 2: UX Journey Gaps (2026-06-10 sweep)

completions.notes: Health-gate buildState re-broadcast (identity-guarded) + per-step build-history records; Codex 3 rounds REVIEW CLEAN; node 3529/3529, vitest 332/332
